description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, flat design and slightly rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful geometric wallpaper, a front-facing camera, and a speaker grille at the top. The back is matte black with a prominent green illuminated logo centered near the upper half, and a dual camera module with flash positioned horizontally near the top. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or hard plastic, with minimal visible buttons or ports. The overall build suggests a premium device, likely constructed from a combination of glass, metal, and plastic, with a sleek and minimalist aesthetic. The phone is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, matte black back, green logo, and dual rear cameras. The design is minimalist and premium, with a colorful screen and slim profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with colorful geometric wallpaper, front camera, and speaker grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and absence of visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black finish, green illuminated logo, and dual rear cameras with flash.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thin edge, similar to the left side, with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A green illuminated logo, resembling three intertwined snakes, is centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful geometric wallpaper with the time '13:37' and the date 'Wednesday, October 10' in white text at the center.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a single front-facing camera at the top left of the front, and a dual camera module with flash arranged horizontally near the top center of the back.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible in the provided views.
